title: cirsium filipendulum subsp. grumosum
intro: Cirsium filipendulum subsp. grumosum, also known as thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to treat wounds and infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Cirsium filipendulum subsp. grumosum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
